description: This is a sample description in English.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Assalam Fondation! We are dedicated to making a positive impact in our community through various initiatives and programs. Our mission is to empower individuals and foster a sense of belonging and support.
aboutUs.missionStatement: We believe in the power of collaboration and strive to work alongside community members to create sustainable solutions that address the needs of our society.

aboutBaraka.title: About Fataer Al Baraka
aboutBaraka.purposeText: Fataer Al Baraka is a training center dedicated to teaching Moroccan pastry and cake production, serving as a springboard towards autonomy and personal fulfillment for women in precarious situations.
aboutBaraka.approachText: We honor Moroccan culinary tradition by enabling women to transform their passion for pastry into a real life opportunity, particularly widows and vulnerable women.
aboutBaraka.impactText: Through our program, we fight against precariousness by offering women concrete professional opportunities and strengthening the spirit of solidarity within local communities.

aboutCenter.title: About Centre Himaya
aboutCenter.foundationText: Centre Himaya is part of the Al Salam Foundation for Social Development, with 36 sections spread across several cities in the Kingdom of Morocco.
aboutCenter.approachText: We distinguish ourselves by our caring approach towards women and children in difficult situations, striving to overcome all obstacles that may hinder the socio-economic empowerment of women and children.
aboutCenter.achievementText: Our journey has been crowned by the opening of a multidisciplinary support center for women and children in difficult situations, in partnership with the Ministry of Women and Social Solidarity and the Provincial Directorate of Casablanca Anfa.

aboutImtiaz.title: About Imtiaz Project
aboutImtiaz.missionText: To support and empower brilliant students from disadvantaged backgrounds, guiding them towards academic excellence and professional success.
aboutImtiaz.visionText: To create a generation of leaders who are academically excellent, morally upright, and socially responsible.
aboutImtiaz.valuesText: Excellence, Integrity, Empowerment, Social Responsibility, and Continuous Learning.

aboutNadi.title: About Nadi Assalam
aboutNadi.purposeText: Nadi Assalam is a training center dedicated to teaching traditional and modern sewing, designed to give hope and opportunities to widows and women in precarious situations.
aboutNadi.approachText: We offer more than just training: we enable these women to reinvent themselves, regain economic autonomy, and become actors of their own future.
aboutNadi.impactText: Through our program, we fight against precariousness by offering women concrete income opportunities and strengthening solidarity within communities.

aboutRayhana.title: About Rihana As-Salam
aboutRayhana.foundationText: Inaugurated in 2013 in partnership with the Regional Directorate of Anfa at El Bachiri School, affiliated with the As-Salam Foundation for Social Development, Casablanca-Anfa section.
aboutRayhana.approachText: We focus on developing children's social, cognitive, and emotional skills through directed activities and play in a safe and inspiring educational environment.
aboutRayhana.capacityText: The preschool has two equipped rooms to welcome children, providing a comfortable and stimulating learning environment for our young learners.

activitiesRayhana.title: Our Activities
activitiesRayhana.educationalItem2: Educational games to stimulate critical thinking
activitiesRayhana.educationalItem3: Storytelling to improve listening and concentration
activitiesRayhana.socialItem2: Educational sessions on values like friendship and respect
activitiesRayhana.creativeItem2: Crafting with simple and safe materials
